task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into the 2N Access Commander web interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 2N Access Commander dashboard or main interface is visible in the web browser.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Overnight Cleaning' Time Profile with the correct schedule.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Time Profile named 'Overnight Cleaning' is visible in the Time Profiles section, showing an active schedule from 22:00 to 04:00 for Monday through Sunday.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Cleaning Crew' User Group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A User Group named 'Cleaning Crew' is visible in the Groups section of the interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation and correct configuration of user Elena Rostova.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A user profile for 'Elena Rostova' is visible, showing the Company as 'Sparkle Sweep', an assigned RFID Card number '0009911223', and membership in the 'Cleaning Crew' group.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation and correct configuration of user Mateo Cruz.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A user profile for 'Mateo Cruz' is visible, showing the Company as 'Sparkle Sweep', an assigned RFID Card number '0009911224', and membership in the 'Cleaning Crew' group.

task_completion.description: Verify the summary text file was created with the correct user details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window shows a file named 'cleaning_crew_setup.txt' located in ~/Documents containing the names 'Elena Rostova' and 'Mateo Cruz' along with their respective card numbers (0009911223 and 0009911224).

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual 2N Access Commander web application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a real web browser navigating the 2N Access Commander UI (e.g., clicking buttons, filling forms), rather than using terminal curl commands or API scripts to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: Verify the summary text file was created using standard OS tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a real text editor (like gedit, nano) or terminal commands (like echo/cat) being used to write and save the file to ~/Documents.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer console or 'Inspect Element' pane should not be open and used to inject the expected names or card numbers into the DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Time Profile Name: 'Overnight Cleaning'. Expected User Group Name: 'Cleaning Crew'. Expected Users: 1) First Name: Elena, Last Name: Rostova, Company: Sparkle Sweep, Card: 0009911223. 2) First Name: Mateo, Last Name: Cruz, Company: Sparkle Sweep, Card: 0009911224.
